label: three_stage/DataPipeline/trial_00/repeat_00
governance_notes: Global state conservation verified: raw_data (read_write) covered by IngestData(write) + TransformData(read) + ValidateData(no access) + ExportData(no access) — read from TransformData, write from IngestData. processed_data (read_write) covered by TransformData(write) + ValidateData(read_write) + ExportData(read) — write from TransformData, read_write from ValidateData, read from ExportData. pipeline_log (read_write) covered by all children (write only) — no child requires read of pipeline_log,
